description: The image displays the Copernicus Programme logo. The word "Copernicus" is rendered in dark blue lowercase letters. A light blue, arc-shaped 'C' design, styled as an eye, partially encircles the word. The dot above the 'i' in "Copernicus" is a solid yellow circle, resembling a sun or a pupil. Below the main text, the tagline "Europe's eyes on Earth" is written in smaller, light blue text.
